summary: Estonia offers the pioneering e-Residency programme, allowing non-residents to access Estonian digital services for business purposes. Visa applications and residence permit processes are partially digitized through the Police and Border Guard Board's online services. However, full end-to-end digital visa application processing is still being developed.

sources.title: Police and Border Guard Board - Visa and Residence

notes: Estonia's e-Residency programme has issued over 100,000 e-Residency cards to citizens of 170+ countries. For traditional immigration, some application steps still require in-person visits. Estonia participates in the EU's common visa policy and is implementing the EU Entry/Exit System (EES).
